---
title: "Contact"
---

## Email

[andrew.rosenberg@ufl.edu](mailto:andrew.rosenberg@ufl.edu)

## Office

Department of Political Science\
University of Florida\
Anderson Hall\
Gainesville, FL 32611

## Meetings

Prospective students, collaborators, and journalists are welcome to schedule a
meeting directly through my Outlook booking page:
[outlook.office.com/bookwithme](https://outlook.office.com/bookwithme/).

## Mailing list

For occasional updates on new papers and talks, drop me a note by email.
